title: The Village
description: A pack create for a group of friends of mine, trying not to die with our own dumb selves.
body:
A modpack for my friends and myself. Combining the tech of Mekanism, big reactors, draconic evolution, create and much more with the Magic of Ars Nouveau, rfelics, Artifacts, and much more once again. Explore the world from Regions unexplored and Biomes O'Plenty with the structures of Explorify, End Remastered, Dungeons+, and so many more. 

Enjoy, Build, Demolish, repeat with many different methods of play.
